title: Short title
doc_html:
PART X-B.  EARLY LEARNING CENTER LICENSING

§407.31.  Short title

This Part may be cited as the "Early Learning Center Licensing Act".

Acts 2014, No. 868, §2, eff. Oct. 1, 2014.
